english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
[Al Falaq – The Daybreak 113 : 0]

Say, ‘I seek the protection of the Lord of the daybreak
[Al Falaq – The Daybreak 113 : 1]

from the evil of what He has created,
[Al Falaq – The Daybreak 113 : 2]

and from the evil of the dark night when it falls,
[Al Falaq – The Daybreak 113 : 3]

and from the evil of the witches, who blow on knots,
[Al Falaq – The Daybreak 113 : 4]

and from the evil of the envious one when he envies.’
[Al Falaq – The Daybreak 113 : 5]
